response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in software development with experience in C++ and geospatial systems, including a relevant open-source GIS platform (GISCollective). However, his recent roles have focused heavily on web/mobile development and AI-agent infrastructure, with limited evidence of work on low-latency routing pipelines or distributed systems at scale. His expertise in C++ is not explicitly highlighted in recent roles.
strengths: Demonstrated experience with geospatial data processing (GISCollective)
Proficient in C++ and Dlang, with some Rust exposure (though not recent)
Strong background in distributed systems and real-time data handling (sociomantic)
concerns: Limited recent experience with routing/navigation systems or high-performance C++ for geospatial pipelines
No clear evidence of optimizing routing tiles, reducing latency, or integrating real-time traffic signals
Recent roles emphasize web/mobile development and AI workflows over core routing infrastructure

key_factors.factor: Recent work on distributed routing pipelines
